title: The Ultimate Performance ModPack
description: Around 55 Peformance Mods packed into 1 modpack. Plus Some QOL mods
body:
This modpack improves Minecraft in many ways with only a stack of mods (literally), enhancing the game's performance by 8x original amount

For Example:

The Ultimate Minecraft Performance ModPack:                       



![1408 fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd909803354cb50a5659ad3e48a5a9433dfd46fe.png)

Vanilla Minecraft:

![176 fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ab70d1ad9ec663edfcabdb0569706e0acc351d.png)

Additionaly, this modpack includes other mods, not peformance based.

For Example:

7 different Shaders to choose from

Immersive aircrafts

Dungeons and Taverns

Terralith

Veinminer

Tree Harverster


Overall, this modpack makes Minecraft look better and be more enjoyable while also making the game run smoother than ever.
